libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime on JDK 25/current-defaults, ensure the generated test setup applies native runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for 5.0.1/Netty 4.2.x. Meaningful WebClient coverage can use an in-process Vert.x `HttpServer` on localhost; no external service or Docker image is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If tests exercise `OAuth2WebClient`, `vertx-auth-oauth2` is optional in the POM and would require an explicit test dependency; this is not needed for core WebClient coverage.
Native Image verification may still expose reachability metadata gaps independent of the Netty runtime properties.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves Vert.x 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final; existing 5.0.0 tests already needed Netty/JDK 25 native runtime properties, and the reported 5.0.1 override bypasses the 5.0.0-only guard.
